statusVocabulary.passed: The command ran locally and returned exit code 0.
statusVocabulary.external-pending: The local harness exists, but a live, provider, Docker, paid, destructive, physical, or approved external prerequisite was intentionally not exercised.
statusVocabulary.blocked-tooling: The validation path exists, but required local tooling was unavailable in this environment.
